subject: CPS-341 Support for multiple data tree instances under 1 anchor
commit_message:
CPS-341 Support for multiple data tree instances under 1 anchor

	- Updated the parseJsonData method so it can parse JSON with multiple data trees, now it returns Collection of NormalizedNodes
	- Added new methods in CpsDataPersistenceService to store multiple Data Nodes
	- Updated CpsDataServiceImpl and DataNodeBuilder, to handle Collection of NormalizedNodes
	- Updated test case to test multiple data trees in CpsDataServiceImplSpec and YangUtilsSpec
	- Updated existing test cases in CpsDataServiceImplSpec, CpsDataPersistenceServiceIntegrationSpec and E2ENetworkSliceSpec
	- Updated test cases and added license information to JsonParserStreamSpec
	- Removed the for-loop work around from CpsDataServiceImpl
	- Addressed comments from previous patch

Change-Id: I4a868e75ec07dfff2d2779e1418c298474153b07
Signed-off-by: arpitsingh <as00745003@techmahindra.com>
